channel.title: Developer-Workflows on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Developer-Workflows on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: ​​What’s new in Microsoft Security: June 2026
item.description:
Microsoft’s June 2026 security update post says the month’s changes focus on identity and multicloud foundations, data protection across locations, and securing developer workflows for AI-related work. The provided excerpt does not include product-level details or specific feature announcements.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: commandline: Introducing Command Line, and the new rules for builders
item.description:
Microsoft introduces a new “rules for builders” framing around agentic AI development, saying the traditional software development lifecycle is no longer sufficient. The post positions the guidance as a shift in workflows and mindset for building with AI agents.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
